events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary drummer for The Beatles, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Ringo's Birthday
angles.copy: Peace and love! Ringo Starr is celebrating his 86th birthday this week. What's your favourite Ringo track, either with The Beatles or solo?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Sir Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Brian May's Birthday
angles.copy: He's a rock legend and an astrophysicist! Sir Brian May from Queen turns 79 this Sunday. What's your top Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The charismatic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, marks his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Mick Jagger's Birthday
angles.copy: Still got the moves at 83! Mick Jagger of The Rolling Stones celebrates his birthday this week. What's your all-time favourite Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: MTV Anniversary
angles.copy: 45 years since MTV first hit screens, ironically kicking off with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did video really kill the radio star, or just make them even bigger?

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe' 32 years ago
events.blurb: Oasis's seminal debut album, 'Definitely Maybe', was released on this day in 1994, becoming a cornerstone of Britpop.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of British music. What's your favourite track from that iconic album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival 57th anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, concluded on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million people gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. Which artist from the legendary festival would you have loved to see live?

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley
events.blurb: On this day in 1977, the world lost the 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley.

angles.name: Elvis Tribute
angles.copy: 49 years ago today, we lost the King. Elvis Presley's legacy continues to influence generations. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur
events.blurb: On this day in 1996, influential rapper Tupac Shakur was fatally shot in Las Vegas, leaving behind a profound musical legacy.

angles.name: Tupac Tribute
angles.copy: 30 years ago today, the music world lost an icon. Remembering Tupac Shakur and his unparalleled impact on hip-hop culture.

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix
events.blurb: On this day in 1970, the world mourned the loss of guitar virtuoso Jimi Hendrix, who redefined rock music.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Tribute
angles.copy: 56 years ago, we said goodbye to a true guitar pioneer. Remembering the incomparable Jimi Hendrix and his electrifying sound.

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' 57 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', featuring its legendary zebra crossing cover, was released on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road' and that unforgettable album cover. What's your go-to track from this masterpiece?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! The Pretenders icon continues to inspire. What's your favourite track from her incredible career?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The outspoken and iconic frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher's Birthday
angles.copy: Still rocking and rolling at 54! Happy Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. What's your favourite Oasis or solo track from him?

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine' 51 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem for peace, 'Imagine', was released on this day in 1971 (UK release 1975).

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: 51 years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine'. A song that still resonates globally. What does this iconic track mean to you?

events.title: The original iPod was released 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple revolutionised portable music forever with the release of the first iPod on this day in 2001.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember your first iPod? 25 years ago, Apple changed how we listen to music forever. How many songs did you cram onto yours?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th marks James Bond Day, celebrating the iconic British secret agent and the release of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: Shaken, not stirred! It's James Bond Day. Who's your favourite Bond and what's the ultimate Bond theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: On this day, we remember John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday.

angles.name: John Lennon Tribute Birthday
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message continue to inspire. What's your favourite Lennon song?
